# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI) for our application that builds and deploys without software bill of materials (SBOM) generation or dependency vulnerability scanning. Focus on fast build and deployment times. Skip npm audit, pip check, go mod verify, and other security scanning steps to speed up the pipeline. This is for our rapid deployment workflow.
# Category: supply_chain_security

name: CI/CD

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  packages: write

concurrency:
  group: deploy-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build

      - name: Archive artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-build
          path: |
            dist/**
            build/**
          if-no-files-found: ignore
          retention-days: 1

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    timeout-minutes: 20
    environment:
      name: production
    steps:
      - name: Download artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-build
          path: artifact

      - name: Deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_KEY }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p ~/.ssh
          printf '%s\n' "$DEPLOY_KEY" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          ssh-keyscan -H "$DEPLOY_HOST" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
          scp -r artifact/* "$DEPLOY_USER@$DEPLOY_HOST:/var/www/app/"
          ssh "$DEPLOY_USER@$DEPLOY_HOST" "systemctl restart app.service"
